paper_title: Tooth Morphology Analysis in Upper Miocene Ukrainian Localities

methods.description: This method describes the preparation and analysis of tooth samples from various taxa for morphological examination using scanning electron microscopy. The process involves embedding, grinding, cleaning, and imaging of tooth samples to study their enamel structure.

steps.description: The preparation of teeth for the analysis followed von Koenigswald (1980), and improved in later works. The method was slightly modified by omitting the cut with a diamond saw (IsoMet® Low Speed Saw), which can cause teeth damage; the specimens were ground immediately after embedding them in epoxy resin (Epoxy Embedding Medium kit -45359 Sigma-Aldrich GmbH).
steps.searchable_summary: Embed tooth samples in epoxy resin and grind them for analysis

steps.description: The quality of grinding was controlled under stereomicroscope.
steps.searchable_summary: Inspect the quality of ground tooth samples using a stereomicroscope

steps.description: The samples were rinsed for 10 seconds in a 5% HCl solution followed by ethanol, and placed for 30 seconds in the ultrasonic apparatus to remove the dust.
steps.searchable_summary: Clean tooth samples using HCl, ethanol, and ultrasonic cleaning

steps.description: The cross sections were standard for all samples and were analysed in a scanning electron microscope (Zeiss EVO LS 15) in the Laboratory of Electron Microscopy, Faculty of Biology and Animal Sciences, Wrocław University of Environmental and Life Sciences.
steps.searchable_summary: Analyze tooth cross sections using a scanning electron microscope

steps.description: Longitudinal sections were also made for Ochotona sp. from Popovo 3.
steps.searchable_summary: Create and analyze longitudinal sections for specific samples

steps.description: Approximately 10-12 images per tooth were taken, which was sufficient for the analysis. As a rule, the detailed photographs of enamel were taken in corresponding tooth areas (anteroconid, metaconid, hypoconid, protoconid).
steps.searchable_summary: Capture detailed images of tooth enamel at specific areas
